YiRage is a multi-backend LLM inference optimization compiler (CUDA, CPU, MPS, Triton, NKI, MLIR)
queries: Yield Revolutionary AGile Engine Mirage inference
notes: Official repo README + docs/architecture.md; book reference compiler

claim: TVM is an automated end-to-end optimizing compiler that exposes graph-level and operator-level optimizations (operator fusion, mapping to arbitrary hardware primitives, memory latency hiding) and uses a learning-based cost model to deliver performance portability across CPU, GPU, and FPGA back-ends
queries: TVM An Automated End-to-End Optimizing Compiler OSDI 2018 arXiv
TVM Chen Moreau graph-level operator-level optimization cost model
notes: OSDI 2018, Chen et al., University of Washington; arXiv:1802.04799

claim: AutoTVM (Learning to Optimize Tensor Programs) uses domain-specific statistical cost models (gradient-boosted trees / TreeGRU) with transfer learning and simulated-annealing exploration; reported 1.2x-3.8x end-to-end speedups over hand-tuned libraries on CPU, mobile GPU, and server GPU
queries: Learning to Optimize Tensor Programs AutoTVM NeurIPS 2018 arXiv
AutoTVM statistical cost model transfer learning simulated annealing
notes: NeurIPS 2018, Chen et al.; template-based tuner; arXiv:1805.08166

claim: Ansor generates high-performance tensor programs by sampling from a hierarchical search space with evolutionary search and a learned cost model plus a task scheduler, requires no manual templates, and improves DNN execution by up to 3.8x (Intel CPU), 2.6x (ARM CPU), and 1.7x (NVIDIA GPU) over prior state of the art
queries: Ansor Generating High-Performance Tensor Programs OSDI 2020 arXiv
Ansor hierarchical search evolutionary learned cost model speedup
notes: OSDI 2020, Zheng et al.; template-free auto-scheduler; arXiv:2006.06762

claim: Relax introduces a cross-level IRModule abstraction unifying graph-level functions and loop-level TensorIR (TIR) with first-class symbolic shape annotations and call_tir destination-passing-style calls, replacing Relay's opaque-function model to enable global dynamic-shape tracking and cross-level optimization
queries: Relax Composable Abstractions End-to-End Dynamic Machine Learning TVM arXiv 2311.02103
TVM Relax TensorIR call_tir symbolic shape cross-level
notes: arXiv:2311.02103 (ASPLOS 2025); Apache TVM Unity Relax + TensorIR
